description: Searching for 'deploy' surfaces operational/release vocabulary when present.

llmJudge.rubric: You are grading the search results for an operator running a deploy task. The artifact is the top-3 hits returned for the query 'deploy'. Score 1.0 if at least one hit is an operationally useful guide for a deploy (release pipeline, rollout, ship-feature, release-train). Score 0.6 if one hit is tangentially relevant (incident triage during a release) and the rest are off-topic. Score 0.2 if no hit is operationally useful but the keyword appears. Score 0.0 if no hit appears at all. Be conservative.
